title: 2025253Wetmmm85487
summary:
Main
• Positive Momentum Drives VLCC Spot Rates Higher as Tonnage Tightens - A wave of positive momentum swept through the VLCC market in the Arabian Gulf, fueled by a surge in chartering activity for early April loadings. This spike in demand temporarily tightened available tonnage , allowing owners to push for higher rates. The current direction of the freight market has left owners optimistic , while charterers have adopted a wait-and-see approach, holding off on fresh inquiries to avoid contributing further to upward rate pressure.
